claim_boundary: This workplan registers workstation command-center upgrades only. It does not implement autonomous action, production monitoring, external routing, hidden escalation, surveillance, targeting, or truth-resolution systems.
core_principle: The big upgrade is not more tools. It is less guessing: the machine should know what phase it is in, what it is allowed to say, what it is not allowed to touch, and when the user gets fireworks.
global_boundaries: no weapons, targeting, surveillance, or harmful operationalization
Git must be clean before celebration
purpose: Upgrade the terminal from a repo/workflow runner into a civilian-safe command center with dashboarding, active workplan awareness, claim-safety gates, provenance vaulting, cockpit modes, and canonical landing behavior.

upgrade_phases.completion_note: Read-only Mission Control dashboard created. It shows active workplan, Git state, recent commit, tracker output, open risks, and boundary language without replacing wiki_landing.
upgrade_phases.done_when: specshift_board displays active workplan, tracker status, Git status, recent commit, risk summary, and canonical progress value without duplicating wiki_landing fireworks.
upgrade_phases.goal: One command opens a full status board: active phase, Git, wiki health, next action, last commit, open risks, and progress fireworks.

upgrade_phases.boundary: State tracking only. No guessing from stale hardcoded phases.
upgrade_phases.completion_note: active_workplan.json upgraded into explicit shared state brain with schema, risk state, parked state, next action, blockers, closure rule, allowed/forbidden actions, and canonical landing command.
upgrade_phases.done_when: active_workplan.json schema includes active_tracker, next_action, blockers, closure_rule, risk_state, and parked_state fields.
upgrade_phases.goal: Every project gets phase, tracker, next action, blockers, and closure rule in active_workplan.json.

upgrade_phases.completion_note: Kira recommendation engine created. It reads active_workplan.json, active tracker progress, Git state, blockers, and risk state, then produces local workflow guidance only.
upgrade_phases.done_when: Kira recommendations are driven by active tracker output, active_workplan.json, Git state, and claim-risk state.
upgrade_phases.goal: Upgrade Kira from generic advice to rule-based recommendations.
rules: if 100 percent complete: close or park
if dirty Git: commit, restore, or park
if partial: show next exact file or script
if high-risk claim: run Claim Gauntlet

upgrade_phases.boundary: Human-friendly feedback only. No interference with commands.
upgrade_phases.completion_note: Phil morale layer created. It gives comic pacing feedback only after serious checks pass and never executes commands or overrides Kira.
upgrade_phases.done_when: Phil output appears only after Git is clean and audit/landing status passes.
upgrade_phases.goal: A safe terminal stage manager that gives comic summaries only after serious audit passes.

upgrade_phases.boundary: Language safety scan only. No legal/compliance certification.
upgrade_phases.completion_note: Claim Gauntlet created. It scans local text for risky overstatement terms, distinguishes allowlisted boundary context, and suggests safer bounded language.
upgrade_phases.done_when: claim_gauntlet scans docs/wiki/operator memory and returns risky terms with safer replacement suggestions.
upgrade_phases.goal: Local scanner flags risky words and suggests safer replacements.

upgrade_phases.boundary: Promotion gate only. Human review still required.
upgrade_phases.completion_note: Artifact promotion gate created. It checks Git cleanliness, Claim Gauntlet status, provenance hash, public/private boundary, buyer-safe wording, and boundary language before allowing promotion.
upgrade_phases.done_when: promote_artifact refuses unsafe promotion and writes a gate report.
upgrade_phases.goal: Nothing moves from scratch/wiki/operator memory into public docs unless it passes gate checks.

upgrade_phases.boundary: Workflow shutdown only. No OS-level lockout.
upgrade_phases.completion_note: close_universe created. It summarizes landed work, parked work, tomorrow's first task, and reminds that wiki_landing owns fireworks.
upgrade_phases.done_when: close_universe writes a shutdown note, parks unfinished work, shows tomorrow first task, and ends with wiki_landing.
upgrade_phases.goal: Show what landed, what is parked, tomorrow's first task, then lock into no-more-work mode with canonical landing.

upgrade_phases.boundary: Local provenance record only. No public disclosure by default.
upgrade_phases.done_when: provenance_vault records artifacts with hash, timestamp, path, public/private/protected/archive-caution status, wiki link, and promotion history.
upgrade_phases.goal: Every PDF, note, packet, and release gets SHA-256, timestamp, file path, status, linked wiki page, and promotion history.

upgrade_phases.boundary: Visualization only. Source of truth remains registered JSON and trackers.
upgrade_phases.done_when: phase_map renders completed, active, parked, protected, and caution states from registered workplans.
upgrade_phases.goal: Terminal-rendered map of phases with status icons.

upgrade_phases.boundary: Context loading only. No autonomous work or hidden routing.
upgrade_phases.done_when: cockpit mode loads relevant commands, paths, wiki pages, trackers, and next actions for the selected mission.
upgrade_phases.goal: Switch the machine into current mission mode.

voice_anchor.kira: Civilian-safe, but genuinely unusual. Not more chaos. More command center.
voice_anchor.phil: A workstation that feels like it has a bridge crew, not a folder problem.
